item.title: flex-shrink calculation
item.author: neotan.github.io
item.description: flex-shrink is a tricky point in flexbox mechanism, let me show you how the browser calculate the final value. See the Pen flex-shrink calculation by Neo Tan (@neotan) on CodePen.
